The following table shows the number of employees and the number of employees of the company, as of December 31, 2017, by department.

|   Sl. No. | Description of evidences collected                                                                                                                                                                              | Remarks            |
|-----------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------|
|         1 | Copy of Panchama dated 25.05.2022, drawn at the registerepid premises of M/s Shakti Agro Chem and Fertilizers i.e. Shop no. 10, 2nd floor Radhey Corner, Lal  Cebi circle, S.P. Ring road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad. | Found Non-existent |

PANCHNAMA DRAWN AT M/S SHAKTI AGRO CHEM &amp; FERTILIZER (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) AT SHOP NO.10, 2ND FLOOR, RADHEY CORNER, LAL GEBI CIRCLE, S.P. RING ROAD, HAHIJAN, AHMEDABAD, 382445 ON 25/05/2022

| Sr.   | Name & Address of the Panchas              |   Age (Years) | Occupation   |
|-------|--------------------------------------------|---------------|--------------|
| (1)   | Shri. Patel Abdulthai                      |            48 | Service      |
| (2)   | Shri. Lalluvadia PragneshKumar Anantray, A |            48 | Business     |
| (3)   | Shri. Lalluvadia PragneshKumar Anantray, A |            48 | Service      |
| (4)   | P.Ring Road, Daskoi, Ahmedabad- 382445     |            48 | Business     |

We, the abovedetailed persons, on being calledd upon by a person who introduces himself as Shri Navadeep Singh Sidhhu, Intelligence Officer, Directorate General of GST Intelligence (DGGI), Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad, present ourselves at Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445. Shri Navadeep Singh Sidhhu, IO informs us that a search in premise of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem &amp; Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) registered in GST at shop 10, 2nd Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445, is to be conducted in th ematter of evasion of Goods and Services Tax and shows us the Authorization for Search (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) 202205DWW30000000C8 dated 25/05/2022 issue under Section-67(2) of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, by the Additional Director, DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit which is valid for 02 days for search at the above said address. The officer then requests us to witness the said search proceedings as indespene d Panchas and also requests us to remain present during entire search proceedings. We, give our consent to witness the said search proceedings as independent Panchas and agree to remain present at the premises till the completion of the entire search proceeding and we put our dated signature on the said Authorization for Search (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) 202205DWW30000000C8 dated 25/05/2022. Shri Navadeep Singh Sidhhu, IO then introduces other accompanying officer as Shri Kopula Balakrishna, IO, DGGI-Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad (hereinafter called as "the Officers" for brevity). We both the panchas and the officers are aware of the social distance, arrive at the entrance of the registered

business premise of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem &amp; Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F12B) registered in GST at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi (Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 at 15:00 Hrs. On reaching the entrance of shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 it is observed that a lard with name of Vinayak Road Tech and GST No. 24AZBPJ0114C2ZCisaffixed at the Shop as follows:

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

In presence of we the panchas, the officers knock at the door of the shop and a person comes forward and introduces himself as Shri. Tejas P Jolapara husband of proprietor of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech. Thc officers in presence of we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara about M/s. Shakti Agro Chem &amp; Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) and its owner Smt. Ilaben Patel, to which Shri. Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers that he has never heard of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem &amp; Fertilizer, however Shri. Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers that he has taken the shop on rent from Shri. Ankit Patel,

Before me,

Navdeep Singh Sidhu

Intelligence Officer,

DGGI, Ahmedabad Zone

Other

## FORM GST INS-02 ORDER OF SEIZURE [See Rule 139(2)]

Whereas a search under sub-section (2) of Section 67 was conducted by me starting from 25.05.2022 started at 03.00 PM at the premises of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem &amp; Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) located at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Geliet Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445.

| Sr. No.   | Name & Addressee of the Panchas         | Age (Years)                                                                           | Occupation   |
|-----------|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|
| (1)       | Shri. Patel Atulbai                     | C-1, Shri.ji.Colony,viratnagar road, odhav, odhav industria lestate, Ahmedabad-382415 | Service      |
| (2)       | Shri. Lalluvadia PragneshKumar Anantray | A-201, Platinum Enclave, Opp. Ayojan Nagar, S P Ring Road, Odhav, Ahmedabad-382445    | Business     |

And during the search, I have reasons to believe that certain documents and/or books and/or things useful for or relevant to the proceedings under this Act are secreted in the places mentioned above.

Therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred upon me under sub-section (2) of Section 67, I hereby seize the following books/documents and things:

## (A) Details of goods seized :

## 1. Nil

## (B) Details of books/documents/things seized :

| M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0I1C2ZC)    | M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0I1C2ZC)    | M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0I1C2ZC)    | M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0I1C2ZC)    |
